# UI Libraries Used

This project uses the following open-source UI libraries for enhanced functionality:

- **Monaco Editor** ([https://microsoft.github.io/monaco-editor/](https://microsoft.github.io/monaco-editor/)): Powers the code editing experience in the filesystem viewer.
- **Preline** ([https://preline.co/docs/context-menu.html](https://preline.co/docs/context-menu.html)): Provides context menu components.
- **BlockNote.js** ([https://www.blocknotejs.org/](https://www.blocknotejs.org/)): Used for rich text markdown rendering and editing.
